detail_desc:
These insects are more of an annoyance than a threat.  It is made up of
hundreds of annoying insects.
long_desc: You hear buzzing, and see a swarm of insects flying at you.

detail_desc:
You hear a high pitch screech.  It is a black furry bat.  This annoying
creature usually travels in flocks, so WATCH OUT.
long_desc: A black furry bat flies into your face.

detail_desc:
The shepherd is a patient old man who has spent all his days looking after
his sheep and all his nights studying the virtue of Humility.  Through the
wrinkles on his face you can see his proud dignity and begin to sense that he
was once a warrior.
long_desc: A humble shepherd is here, looking after his sheep.

detail_desc:
The girl looks shyly at you.  Even at this young age, she has learned enough
of her culture to be humble.  She jumps rope and looks up at you expectantly.
long_desc: A smiling young girl is here.

detail_desc:
Even the sheep in New Magincia seem to exude humbleness.  The sheep has pure
white fleece.
long_desc: A sheep peacefully eats grass.

detail_desc:
Katrina was one of the Warriors of Destiny.  She epitomizes the virtue of
humility.  After her great Enlightenment, she traveled back to her home and
helped rebuild Magincia.  She still is a great warrior and an able guardian of
New Magincia.
long_desc: Katrina the Shepherd is here, looking over the village.

detail_desc:
This giant rat is smelly and fleas jump up from its fur.  The rats have been
a great problem in the Library because they eat and shred the books.  This rat
seems to be rabid, so beware its teeth.
long_desc: A rat is gnawing on a book.

detail_desc:
This scavenger has seemed to have collected many things, including books,
scrolls, and other scraps.  Its glistening teeth drip with poison.
long_desc: A giant spider sits on its web.

detail_desc:
The mage, in his ever-increasing search for Honesty and Truth, has come to
the library to peruse the ancient tomes of knowledge.  He glances at you, and
returns to his study.
long_desc: A mage stands here, reading a book.

detail_desc:
Nystul is the mentor, teacher, mage of the Lyceum.  He is a shining example
of Truth.  His head is bowed over a book, but power radiates from him.
long_desc: Nystul the Librarian sits at his desk, writing some scrolls.

detail_desc:
Mariah is another Warrior of Destiny.  She joined the Avatar to add some
magical punch during his Enlightenment.  She seems serene in her total devotion
to the virtue of Honesty.
long_desc: Mariah walks around the stacks, busily looking for a book.

detail_desc:
The slime is an amorphous goo.  It seems pretty wimpy, but it has a lot of
friends.  As you look at it you wonder how these things reproduce.
long_desc: An ugly green mass sits on the ground in a puddle.

detail_desc:
The green snake's tongue darts in and out tasting the air.  It senses spilled
beer and the distinctive taste of human.
long_desc: The snake strikes.

detail_desc:
This useless horse is a novelty, he can talk.  Though his talk is often
meaningless and he gives out irrelevant clues, his sleek body and his much
practiced jaw muscles can be very dangerous.
long_desc: Mr. Smithy, the talking horse, is chewing hay.

detail_desc:
The bard seems happy and content to play his mandolin.  He is a seeker of
Compassion, but in his spare time he sings and dances.
long_desc: A bard sits here, strumming his mandolin.

detail_desc:
He is more accustomed to receiving Compassion than giving it.  But help him
out guv, give him a few coins.
long_desc: A beggar is here with his hand out.

detail_desc:
Iolo is one of the first Warriors of Destiny.  He seems to be a little bit
tipsy from the party and you wonder why he has wandered down to the cellar.
Anyway, in the spirit of the virtue Compassion that he embodies, he holds out a
bottle for you.
long_desc: Iolo sits here with a bottle in his hand and a smile on his face.

detail_desc:
Chuckles the Jester is here mumbling, 'Spam Spam.'  This annoying character is
Lord British's major entertainment.  He is laughing and telling corny jokes.
He seems to hold his dinner in his hands, and when he dances, the bells on his
hat jingle merrily.
long_desc: Chuckles the Jester is juggling and entertaining.

detail_desc:
This townsman is here partying and having many drinks.  Though he is also an
ardent believer in Compassion, and a responsible citizen, he knows the value of
a good party.
long_desc: A townsman is here downing drinks.

detail_desc:
You see a pretty woman with finally sculptured musculature.  She seems to
guard the party with her Infinity Bow, the best bow in the Ultima world.  Her
kindly eyes seem to emit pure Compassion, and as she wanders, she helps the
drunks up and leads them out the door.
long_desc: Gwenno the Bard, Iolo's happy wife, wanders around with bow in hand.

detail_desc:
This orc is a disgusting animal.  As you look, this ape-like monster
scratches its armpits.  It travels in herds and is a coward.
long_desc: A mutated ape carries a spear.

detail_desc:
This huge monster is immense and powerful.  Over a chest and a head taller
then you, his meaty arms swing a club at you.
long_desc: A stony troll swings his club.

detail_desc:
The Wisp is constantly blinking.  It wishes information exchange.  It looks
peaceful, but will defend itself.
long_desc: A blue ball of light soars over to you and winks.

detail_desc:
Dressed in a hooded robe that obscures his face, the druid is softly chanting
words and traveling through the woods.  He is one that is secure in his sense of
Justice, and enlightened in the ways of judging others.  Through his communion
with nature, he has gained power.
long_desc: A chanting druid walks the woods.

detail_desc:
This druid seems to be entranced by the fire.  She chants softly as she waves
her hand and stares into the flame.  She is one with the flame.  When she looks
at you, her hard eyes only judge, seeking Justice.
long_desc: A druid walks around a flame.

detail_desc:
You cannot help but shiver as you see the Judge sit here silently.  His eyes
pierce into your soul, and he knows.  He knows your faults.  He knows your
virtues.  He knows if you've been bad or good....  So be good.  This ultimate
purveyor of Justice sends criminals to jail everyday, sometimes with his bare
hands.
long_desc: The Judge sits here.

detail_desc:
You meet another Warrior of Destiny.  She helped to lead the magical force to
the Avatar.  The Avatar's mentor in Justice, she has gone to the woods to drive
life into a corner.
long_desc: Jaana the Druid is in deep meditation.

detail_desc:
The Prisoner seems to be a slimy character.  He was a thief, and Justice was
done to him.  You glimpse light shining off something in his hands.
long_desc: The Prisoner grips the bars with his dirty hands.

detail_desc:
This Prisoner was convicted of one of the most heinous crimes, MURDER.  It
took many guards and druids to restrain this beast.
long_desc: The Prisoner is big and grins evilly at you.

detail_desc:
Being the second largest city in Britannia, second only to Britain itself,
this city employs and houses many people.  This citizen of the city of Justice
strolls the street, sure of his Virtue.
long_desc: A citizen of Yew walks around.

detail_desc:
A smiling face asks you what you would like to drink.  Well versed in
Compassion, he has heard and sympathized with many people who have gone to him
for advice.  His advice to you is to kick back and enjoy a drink.
long_desc: A bartender stands here in the the middle of a throng of people.

detail_desc:
The pub owner waves and smiles to you.  She asks what you want to drink and
eat.
long_desc: The owner of the pub walks around, talking to her customers.

detail_desc:
With its two heads, it should make sense that this monster would have double
the intelligence.  But, in fact, it has only half.
long_desc: The ettin scratches its heads and attacks.

detail_desc:
It seems to be just a head with little hands and feet sticking out of it.
It does not seem like these things could hurt you, but your money pouch seems
much lighter.
long_desc: This little creature sneaks around and steals your food.

detail_desc:
No one really understands how these things can sense but, as it unerringly
reaches for you, you know it does.  In any case these creatures are strong and
endurable.
long_desc: The headless creature seems to be heading right for you!

detail_desc:
This fighter is cleaning out the dungeons.  In the peaceful time following
the Avatar's success, there are few ways to show Valor.  One of the more
dangerous is to descend into the pits of hell and clean them out.
long_desc: A muscular fighter searches here.

detail_desc:
The muscle power of the Warriors of Destiny, Geoffrey is immense.  His broad
shoulders make you look like a mouse.  He epitomizes Valor.
long_desc: Geoffrey the Fighter leads this campaign.

detail_desc:
His movements are liquid and art.  As he makes a few practice swings, you
HOPE that you are never on the receiving end of his immense sword.  This is The
Lord of Serpent Hold, courage itself solidified into a human form.
long_desc: Lord Simon of the Serpent Hold stares at your form.

detail_desc:
The treasure chest reforms, and spits out a glob of poison.  Beware,
adventurer, of the Mimic.
long_desc: A treasure chest is here, overflowing with gold.

detail_desc:
This creature is comprised of one main eyeball and several auxiliary eyeballs
coming out of the main.  The eyeballs draw you in, making you forget who you
are....
long_desc: A floating eyeball glares at you.

detail_desc:
The tinker has huge rippling muscles and a scarred skin.  You realize that
his great Sacrifice to his craft has led to his incredible strength and
weaponskill.  This is not one you wish to fight.
long_desc: A tinker is fiddling with one device or another.

detail_desc:
Julia the Tinker provided some of the muscle power to the Avatar during his
Great Quest for enlightenment.  She was a Warrior of Destiny and you see that
not much has changed since those days.  She represents Sacrifice in everything
she does.  She is the Keeper of Oral History, as well as a prominent
weaponsmith.
long_desc: Julia the Tinker is here, forging a sword.

detail_desc:
When you see her your heart almost stops as you feel the intense waves of
pure Love come from her body.  Her love for you almost knocks you down.  You
cannot hurt this one.
long_desc: The Lady of Empath Abbey stands here.

detail_desc:
The Sandtrap burrows around under the sand and comes onto travellers, hidden.
No one is really sure what the Sandtrap looks like but it is a dangerous foe.
long_desc: A tentacle reaches out of the sand and latches onto your leg.

detail_desc:
The dragon looks like every other dragon you've seen; wings, tail, fire.
Only this one doesn't have a dorky color attached to it.  And doesn't talk about
annoying C terms.
long_desc: A dragon lies on his heap of treasure with fire billowing out of his maw.

detail_desc:
This paladin works hard to keep his Honor and the Honor of his people.
Honor does not lead his life, Honor is his life.  His shiny armor and equally
shiny sword serves to remind you that he is among Britannia's most powerful
battalion.
long_desc: A paladin practices his sword strokes here.

detail_desc:
Dupre the Paladin was constant companion of the Avatar and a Warrior of
Destiny.  He is a symbol of Honor.  He is right now trying to figure out a plan
of attack to get the dragon.
long_desc: Sitting here, Dupre the Paladin consults his maps.

detail_desc:
The reaper is immobilized and attached to the ground.  Even with this
disadvantage its tentacles and magical powers more then make up for any
disadvantage.
long_desc: The reaper strikes out with its tentacles.

detail_desc:
Draxthanum, the Winged Gargoyle, is here to observe the odd habits of humans
and their combat tactics.  He is red with wings, very strong and his aura is
overpowering.
long_desc: The King of Gargoyles is here.

detail_desc:
This ghost seems peaceful, even though he is chained to the earth through
some responsibility.
long_desc: The spirit of a peaceful man floats around here.

detail_desc:
Even on its transparent face, you can see a grimace of evil as it swoops over
to you.
long_desc: This ghost was an evil man in a past life.

detail_desc:
The skeleton has rotting bits of flesh attached to its bones.  It carries a
rusty shield and sword.  In fact the only thing completely clean on it are its
white teeth, perhaps from its nightly meals of flesh and bone.
long_desc: The skeleton walks around in tattered clothing.

detail_desc:
The most dangerous undead, and among the most dangerous of all monsters, this
beast can use all magics, is strong and hardy.  Right now he seems to be busy...
Killing you.
long_desc: The daemon unfurls his wings and swoops towards you.

detail_desc:
A mourner is in tears.  She is crying over the grave of a loved one.  She is
expressing poignant Spirituality.  This gives her strength to persevere.
long_desc: A mourner bows her head over the grave.

detail_desc:
The last Warrior of Destiny, Shamino sits here in a yoga position.  The
Enlightened smile on his face confirms that he indeed is one with the spirit of
Spirituality.
long_desc: Shamino the Ranger sits here, meditating.

detail_desc:
The Hourglass that he holds in his hand actually controls the fickle powers
of time.  This being is so awe-inspiring that you feel an urge to prostrate
yourself to him.  But as all godly powers must be, he is truly and totally
neutral.
long_desc: The Timelord is here in an aura of power.

detail_desc:
First you hear a booming voice.  'You will join the Fellowship.'  He is the
latest, and some people say greatest, of the Avatar's enemies.  And now you have
the joy of meeting him.
long_desc: The Guardian, as far as you can tell, is just a big red face.

detail_desc:
Blackthorn was more misguided rather then evil.  Though he was still a foe of
Avatar that eventually was destroyed, during this era he still is corrupt and
VERY, VERY dangerous.
long_desc: Blackthorn wonders how he lost the throne.

detail_desc:
Exodus, the horrible progeny of Minax and Mondain, is here.  More powerful
then his parents, he is also more dangerous.  He was the last of the Triad that
the Avatar destroyed.
long_desc: Exodus is here, reveling in his island fortress.

detail_desc:
More powerful then her master and lover, Minax is as beautiful as she is
dangerous.  Bold enough to take on the forces of evil without the gem, she
eventually proved to be their mistress.  Without the Avatar the world would
still be under her complete power.
long_desc: Minax is here, conjuring up the evil spirits.

detail_desc:
Mondain, the first of the Triad of Evil, was the first foe that the man,
later to be known as the Avatar, was to face.  Mondain has killed his father to
gain the power of the dark gem that he wielded.
long_desc: Mondain grips his evil gem and conjures magic to destroy you.

detail_desc:
Sentri is a powerful man whose only job is to protect the life of Lord
British.  In seeing this done he is completely armored and wields a heavy blade.
long_desc: Sentri stoically stands here, protecting his Lord and castle.

detail_desc:
Batlin is an evil man that goes around and corrupts the young.  You see also
that he has a full set of mantras, probably stolen from their rightful owners.
He is protected though by the power of his god.
long_desc: Batlin says, 'Join the Fellowship.'
The Avatar is here, chatting to Lord British.

detail_desc:
Lord British sits on his throne.  When you see him, you know the meaning of
true leadership.  His charisma is almost tangible.  On him you see the three
crown jewels.  These hold power both figuratively and literally.
long_desc: Lord British is healing the Avatar's wounds.

detail_desc: This fish can sense blood in the water and comes to kill you.
long_desc: The shark smells blood.

detail_desc:
The seahorse is an amazingly beautiful creature.  Its swimming and diving
pleases you.
long_desc: The peaceful seahorse swims here.

detail_desc:
The squid easily is double a boat in size.  Its tentacles are huge and you
fear as it grabs for you.
long_desc: The squid's tentacles reach for you.

detail_desc: The Armorer sells...  Armor.
long_desc: The Armorer stands here.

detail_desc: The Weaponseller sells...  Weapons.
long_desc: The Weaponseller stands here.

detail_desc: The Boatseller sells...  Boats.
long_desc: The Boatseller stands here.
